# WindowSpec.HideUntilInWorld property

When true the framework stops DRAWING this window until the player is logged in / in-world, so gameplay HUDs don't float over the title / character-select screens. Reappears once logged in. Purely draw-time suppression (does NOT change Show/Hide state). Defaults false — debug tools (DebugInfo, AutoNav) leave it off so they stay visible pre-login.

```csharp
public bool HideUntilInWorld { get; set; }
```
